mapper.select: SELECT id, interface_id, config_name, wsdl_url, service_url, namespace, operation_name, port_name, soap_version, soap_action, mtom_enabled, ws_security_type, ws_username, ws_password, ws_password_type, keystore_path, keystore_password, timeout_ms, request_template, response_path, wsdl_cached_at, wsdl_cache, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM eai_soap_config WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, interface_id, config_name, wsdl_url, service_url, namespace, operation_name, port_name, soap_version, soap_action, mtom_enabled, ws_security_type, ws_username, ws_password, ws_password_type, keystore_path, keystore_password, timeout_ms, request_template, response_path, wsdl_cached_at, wsdl_cache, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM eai_soap_config WHERE interface_id = #{interfaceId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO eai_soap_config (interface_id, config_name, wsdl_url, service_url, namespace, operation_name, port_name, soap_version, soap_action, mtom_enabled, ws_security_type, ws_username, ws_password, ws_password_type, keystore_path, keystore_password, timeout_ms, request_template, response_path, is_active) VALUES (#{interfaceId}, #{configName}, #{wsdlUrl}, #{serviceUrl}, #{namespace}, #{operationName}, #{portName}, #{soapVersion}, #{soapAction}, #{mtomEnabled}, #{wsSecurityType}, #{wsUsername}, #{wsPassword}, #{wsPasswordType}, #{keystorePath}, #{keystorePassword}, #{timeoutMs}, #{requestTemplate}, #{responsePath}, #{isActive})
mapper.update:
UPDATE eai_soap_config
interface_id = #{interfaceId}, config_name = #{configName}, wsdl_url = #{wsdlUrl}, service_url = #{serviceUrl}, namespace = #{namespace}, operation_name = #{operationName}, port_name = #{portName}, soap_version = #{soapVersion}, soap_action = #{soapAction}, mtom_enabled = #{mtomEnabled}, ws_security_type = #{wsSecurityType}, ws_username = #{wsUsername},
ws_password = #{wsPassword},
ws_password_type = #{wsPasswordType}, keystore_path = #{keystorePath},
keystore_password = #{keystorePassword},
timeout_ms = #{timeoutMs}, request_template = #{requestTemplate}, response_path = #{responsePath}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
